page.title: Reserve Club
page.subtitle: Recurring boxes, the green-lot allocation behind each cycle, and the dunning queue.

controls.allocateBody: Claim green coffee for {cust}'s next box. This reserves kg against the lot, so a scarce micro-lot can never be promised twice.
controls.irreversible: This claims green inventory. Correct it later with a superseding entry, not a delete.
controls.skipBody: Skip one delivery for {cust}. The subscription stays active.
controls.cancelBody: End {cust}'s Reserve Club box. Existing allocations stay on the books.
controls.dunningBody: Record a failed-payment follow-up for {cust}. A final step marks the subscription past due.

dunningQueue.title: Dunning queue
dunningQueue.description: Subscriptions with a failed payment that need a follow-up.
dunningQueue.empty: No payments need chasing right now.

empty.title: No subscriptions yet
empty.description: Reserve Club boxes show up here with their allocation board and dunning queue.

errors.generic: Could not save that change. Try again.
errors.kgPositive: Kilograms must be greater than zero.
errors.lotRequired: Choose a green lot to allocate.
